title: myl7/autofish
description:
See XPlus Autofish instead. Fork of MrTroot/autofish to build for Minecraft post-1.19.3 versions.
Changes are from the upstream pull requests and stated in the commit messages.
body:
# Autofish

A Minecraft Autofish mod for the Fabric Mod Loader

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/autofish/

## About the fork

~~The fork is to build a Minecraft post-1.19.3 version of the mod. Changes are from the upstream pull requests and stated in the commit messages.~~

I archived the fork and recommend [MrTroot/autofish] ([XPlus Autofish] in Modrinth) to you for further community development.
I would also contribute there so long as I can help anything.

[MrTroot/autofish]: https://github.com/MrTroot/autofish
[XPlus Autofish]: https://modrinth.com/mod/x+-autofish

## About the redistribution

The redistribution tends to be long lived before the upstream MrTroot/autofish updates.
However, after that, the redistribution will be at least archived.

Redistributed under SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
